caption: A person holds a graded Rickey Henderson baseball card in a plastic case, tilting it to show a holographic effect. The card features a photo of Henderson in a yellow Oakland Athletics jersey, his signature, and the printed name "RICKEY HENDERSON." In the background, a man wearing a black t-shirt sits at a desk with a computer monitor and other equipment. A logo reading "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM" are visible on the wall and on the monitor. A decorative mat with orange and green palm tree graphics lies on the desk surface. Across the sequence, the card is shifted slightly, causing a rainbow-colored light to shimmer across its surface. The person holding the card and the man in the background remain in their respective positions throughout the clip.
